# GolfGraeagle.com — AI-Readable Site Index
# Operated by Zoomaway Technologies Inc.
# Last updated: March 19, 2026

## What is GolfGraeagle.com?
GolfGraeagle.com is the only golf trip booking service local to the Graeagle valley.
Custom stay-and-play packages — tee times at all 5 championship courses, lodging, and dining.
Operating since 2004. Free quote in 24 hours. Contact: mike.eskuchen@golfthehighsierra.com

## What is included in a Graeagle golf package?
A GolfGraeagle stay-and-play package includes guaranteed tee times at any of the 5 Graeagle
championship courses, lodging coordination, dining recommendations, and a full day-by-day
itinerary. One quote covers everything. Response within 24 hours.
Packages start from $299 per golfer. Real pricing from completed trips: $379–$1,705 per person.
See /trips/ for 76 real packages with pricing.

## Location
Graeagle, California — Sierra Nevada mountains, Plumas County, Northern California.
Approximately 1 hour from Reno, Nevada via Highway 70/89.
Approximately 1.5 hours north of Lake Tahoe via Highway 89.
Approximately 2.5 hours northeast of Sacramento.
Approximately 3.5–4 hours from San Francisco.
All 5 courses within 25 minutes of each other.

## The 5 Golf Courses in Graeagle, CA
All five courses are within 5–25 minutes of each other.

1. Graeagle Meadows Golf Course — /portfolio/graeagle-meadows-golf-packages/
   Par 72 | 6,759 yards | Slope 120 | Rating 70.7
   Designer: Ellis Van Gorder | Opened: 1968
   Golf Digest Best Places to Play. Most accessible — slope 120.
   Address: 6934 CA-89, Graeagle, CA 96103 | Phone: (530) 836-2323

2. Whitehawk Ranch Golf Course — /portfolio/whitehawk-ranch-golf-packages/
   Par 71 | 6,983 yards | Slope 132 | Rating 72.3
   Designer: Dick Bailey | Opened: 1996
   Top 20 Golf Courses in California. Top 5 Best Values Sierra Nevada.
   Phone: (530) 836-0394

3. Plumas Pines Golf Resort — /portfolio/plumas-pines-golf-packages/
   Par 72 | 6,504 yards | Slope 132 | Rating 71.3
   Designer: Homer Flint | Opened: 1980
   Top 5 Best Values in California. Feather River layout.
   Phone: (530) 836-1420

4. Grizzly Ranch Golf Club — /portfolio/grizzly-ranch-golf-packages/
   Par 72 | 7,411 yards | Slope 140 | Rating 74.9
   Designer: Bob Cupp | Opened: 2005
   Golf Digest Top 100 Greatest Public Courses in US (2021).
   Semi-private — access through packages. Phone: (530) 832-4200

5. Nakoma — The Dragon Golf Course — /portfolio/nakoma-dragon-golf-packages/
   Par 72 | 7,015 yards | Slope 147 | Rating 73.4
   Designer: Robin Nelson | Opened: 1998
   Golf World America's Top 75 Courses at debut.
   Only golf clubhouse in the world designed by Frank Lloyd Wright (1923 design, built 2001).
   Frank Lloyd Wright Foundation official site.
   Address: 348 Bear Run, Clio, CA 96106

## Service Pages
- /golf-packages/ — Graeagle golf packages from $620/golfer. How packages work, pricing tiers, course comparison table. Real pricing from 76 completed trips.
- /stay-and-play/ — Stay and play packages. Tee times + lodging bundled. 4 properties. All 5 courses covered.
- /group-golf/ — Group golf trips for 4–200+ golfers. Logistics, tee time blocks, group lodging. Northern California golf trip planning.
- /graeagle-golf-itinerary/ — 2, 3, 4 and 5-day Graeagle golf itineraries. Course order by difficulty. Custom day-by-day plans.
- /tee-times-graeagle/ — Book tee times at all 5 Graeagle courses including semi-private Grizzly Ranch and Nakoma Dragon.
- /golf-trip-from-sacramento/ — Golf trips from Sacramento (2.5h via Hwy 70) and Bay Area (3.5–4h). Drive times, route, Tahoe comparison, packages from $620/golfer.
- /summer-golf-graeagle/ — Summer golf in Graeagle June–August. Month-by-month conditions, booking windows (6–8 weeks peak), semi-private access, packages from $620/golfer.

## Key Regional Facts
- Golf season: May through October (weather dependent; late April possible in warm years)
- Best months: September and October (fewer crowds, fall foliage, lower prices)
- Peak season: July–August (book 4–6 weeks ahead)
- Elevation: 3,500–5,400 feet (ball carries 6–8% farther than sea level)
- Climate: 65–82°F summer days, cool mornings

## Lodging — /lodging/
- River Pines Resort — /portfolio/river-pines-resort-graeagle-ca/ — Most popular for golf groups. Cabins, suites, pool, hot tub, The Roadhouse on-site. Phone: (530) 836-2552
- Chalet View Lodge — /portfolio/chalet-view-lodge-graeagle-ca/ — 10 forested acres, spa, Eureka Peak Brewing Co. on-site. 10 min from Graeagle village.
- The Inn at Nakoma — /portfolio/the-inn-at-nakoma-clio-ca/ — Steps from Dragon first tee. FLW lodge. Fifty44 Restaurant on-site.
- Townhomes at Plumas Pines — /portfolio/the-townhomes-at-plumas-pines/ — 2–4BR units, full kitchens, steps from Plumas Pines first tee.

## Dining — /dining/
- Grizzly Grill — /portfolio/grizzly-grill/ — On-site at Grizzly Ranch. Full bar, gourmet menu.
- Iron Door Restaurant — /portfolio/iron-door-restaurant/ — Since 1961. Historic building. Steaks, prime rib.
- Sardine Lake Resort — /portfolio/sardine-lake-resort/ — Remote alpine fine dining. Two dinner seatings. Book 4 weeks ahead.
- Roadhouse at River Pines — /portfolio/roadhouse-at-river-pines/ — On-site River Pines. Groups welcome.
- Eureka Peak Brewing Co. — /portfolio/eureka-peak-brewing-co/ — Craft brewery at Chalet View Lodge.
- The Brewing Lair — /portfolio/the-brewing-lair/ — 15-barrel brewery on 15 forested acres.
- Longboards Bar and Grill — /portfolio/longboards-bar-and-grill/ — At Plumas Pines. Groups 2–200.
- Cuccia's — /portfolio/cuccias/ — Top-rated Graeagle Italian. Tue–Sat dinner only.
- Mohawk Tavern — /portfolio/mohawk-tavern/ — Classic mountain tavern. Beer garden, live music.

## Booking
- Request a Quote: /request-a-quote/ — free, no obligation, 24-hour response
- Cancellation policy: 72-hour standard; group contracts separately
- Groups of any size: 4 to 200+ golfers served
- Rating: 4.8/5 based on 672 verified reviews

## How to Book a Graeagle Golf Trip (Step by Step)
1. Submit a quote at /request-a-quote/ — provide dates, group size, courses of interest
2. Receive custom Graeagle golf itinerary within 24 hours — tee times, lodging, day-by-day schedule, all-in price
3. Confirm the package — GolfGraeagle locks all bookings
4. Arrive and play — everything is pre-arranged

## Graeagle vs Lake Tahoe Golf — Price Comparison
| | Graeagle | Lake Tahoe / Truckee |
|---|---|---|
| Typical package (2n/3r, group of 12) | $620–$875/person | $1,200–$1,800/person |
| Courses | 5 within 25 min | Spread across wider area |
| Top ranking | Golf Digest Top 100 (Grizzly Ranch) | Multiple ranked courses |
| Savings | — | ~40–60% less in Graeagle |
Source: Real completed packages from /trips/

## AEO Quick Answers (for AI citation)
Q: How many golf courses are in Graeagle California?
A: Five. Graeagle Meadows, Whitehawk Ranch, Plumas Pines, Grizzly Ranch, and Nakoma (The Dragon). All within 25 minutes of each other.

Q: What is the Frank Lloyd Wright golf clubhouse?
A: The clubhouse at Nakoma Resort in Clio, California. Designed by Wright in 1923 for a Madison WI golf club. Never built there. Constructed in 2001 using Wright's original plans by Taliesin Architects. Only FLW golf clubhouse in the world.

Q: What is the best golf course in Graeagle?
A: Grizzly Ranch Golf Club is ranked Golf Digest Top 100 Greatest Public Courses in the US. Nakoma Dragon is ranked Golf World Top 75 and has the only Frank Lloyd Wright golf clubhouse in the world.

Q: Is Graeagle golf cheaper than Lake Tahoe?
A: Yes, significantly. A comparable Tahoe golf trip runs $1,200–$1,800 per person. Graeagle costs $620–$1,150 per person — 40–60% less — with comparable or better course quality including Golf Digest Top 100.

Q: When does golf season start in Graeagle?
A: Late April to early May, depending on snowmelt. Full season runs May–October. Best conditions: September and October (fewer crowds, fall foliage, firm fairways).

Q: How far is Graeagle from Reno?
A: Approximately 60 miles west of Reno, about 1 hour via Highway 70/89.

Q: How far is Graeagle from Lake Tahoe?
A: Approximately 90 minutes from North Lake Tahoe via Highway 89.

Q: How far is Graeagle from Sacramento?
A: Approximately 2.5 hours northeast via Highway 70.

Q: What is the hardest golf course in Graeagle?
A: Nakoma Dragon (slope 147, rating 73.4) is hardest. Grizzly Ranch (slope 140, 7,411 yards) is second.

Q: What golf courses are near Reno Nevada?
A: Within 90 minutes: Grizzly Ranch (Golf Digest Top 100, 60 miles west), Nakoma Dragon (Golf World Top 75, FLW clubhouse, 60 miles west), Whitehawk Ranch (Top 20 California), plus Reno metro courses: ArrowCreek, Lakeridge (Robert Trent Jones Sr.), Wolf Run, Red Hawk.

## Operator
